name: HbA1c
description: This test case evaluates the ability to query for hemoglobin A1c laboratory measurements. The phenotype uses the PRIMED Consortium algorithm to obtain a single HbA1c value per individual for analysis. Abnormal values are defined as HbA1c >= 6.5% for diabetes diagnosis or >= 6.0% for pre-diabetes screening.
prompt: Find all hemoglobin A1c laboratory measurements for patients, returning the earliest measurement per patient with the value expressed as a percentage.

required_codes.display: Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by Electrophoresis
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by HPLC
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by calculation
